event: Virgin and Child with a Female Saint and the Young John the Baptist
symbols: infant at Mary's breast — the Incarnate Word sustained by human motherhood
young John the Baptist with lamb — the Forerunner and the Lamb of God he will one day proclaim
lamb — Christ as the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world
kneeling female saint — devoted veneration of the Christ child
lush green landscape — the new Eden brought about by the Incarnation
description: In a lush green landscape with rocky cliffs and distant blue mountains, four figures form an intimate group. A woman in a white veil and dark dress sits at center, looking down tenderly. Before her, a woman in a red dress leans forward, embracing or nursing an infant in dark garments. To the right, a young boy stands beside a small white lamb, looking toward the group. The landscape behind is verdant with dense trees. Warm afternoon light falls on the figures.
theological_description: This sacra conversazione — a holy conversation among saints across time — brings together Mary, the Christ child, a female saint, and the young John the Baptist. The lamb beside the Baptist child prefigures his adult proclamation: 'Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world!' (John 1:29). The intimate domestic setting masks cosmic significance — this infant is 'the image of the invisible God, the firstborn over all creation' (Colossians 1:15). The kneeling saint models the devotion that all believers owe to Christ. The lush landscape evokes Eden restored — through this child, the curse of Genesis 3 will be reversed and creation renewed. Mary's centrality reflects her unique role as Theotokos — the God-bearer — through whom the divine entered the material world.

scripture_refs.reason: Behold the Lamb of God — the young Baptist with the lamb prefigures this proclamation
The Baptist leaping in the womb at the presence of Christ — the childhood intimacy depicted
The image of the invisible God — the infant Christ as the visible face of the unseen Father

_meta.title: Virgin and Child with Saint and Saint John
